docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-03-2016 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. AFTER MATTER WAS HEARD, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-03-2016. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2016 - JUDGMENT.
